# init(scene:)

**Initializer**

Initializes an export manager with your app’s window scene.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor init(scene: UIWindowScene)
```

## Parameters

- **scene**: Your app’s window scene. The manager presents the export sheet in this window.
title: init(scene:)
